2605.12260.title: PRISM: Pareto-Efficient Retrieval over Intent-Aware Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Agents
2605.12260.paper_summary: Long-horizon language agents accumulate conversation history far faster than any fixed context window can hold, making memory management critical to both answer accuracy and serving cost. Existing approaches either expand the context window without addressing what is retrieved, perform heavy ingestion-time fact extraction at substantial token cost, or rely on heuristic graph traversal that leaves both accuracy and efficiency on the table. We present PRISM, a training-free retrieval-side framework that treats long-horizon memory as a joint retrieval-and-compression problem over a graph-structured memory. PRISM combines four orthogonal inference-time components: Hierarchical Bundle Search over typed relation paths, Query-Sensitive Edge Costing that aligns traversal with detected query intent, Evidence Compression that compresses the candidate bundle into a compact answer-side context, and Adaptive Intent Routing that routes most queries through zero-LLM tiers. By formulating retrieval as min-cost selection over typed path templates and pairing it with an LLM-side compression step, PRISM surfaces the right evidence under a strict context budget without any fine-tuning or modification to the upstream ingestion pipeline. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that PRISM delivers substantially higher LLM-judge accuracy than every same-protocol baseline at an order-of-magnitude smaller context budget, occupying a previously empty corner of the accuracy-context-cost frontier and demonstrating a superior balance between answer quality and retrieval efficiency.
2605.12260.paper_summary_zh: 長期語言代理的對話歷史積累速度遠超過任何固定的上下文窗口所能容納的，使得記憶管理對於回答的準確性和服務成本至關重要。現有的方法要麼擴展上下文窗口而不解決檢索的內容，要麼在大量的標記成本下進行繁重的攝取時間事實提取，或者依賴啟發式圖遍歷，這使得準確性和效率都無法得到保障。我們提出了PRISM，一個無需訓練的檢索側框架，將長期記憶視為一個基於圖結構記憶的聯合檢索和壓縮問題。PRISM結合了四個正交的推理時間組件：基於類型關係路徑的分層捆綁搜索、與檢測到的查詢意圖對齊的查詢敏感邊成本計算、將候選捆綁壓縮成緊湊答案側上下文的證據壓縮，以及通過零LLM層路由大多數查詢的自適應意圖路由。通過將檢索公式化為基於類型路徑模板的最小成本選擇，並將其與LLM側的壓縮步驟配對，PRISM在嚴格的上下文預算下呈現出正確的證據，而無需對上游攝取管道進行任何微調或修改。在LoCoMo基準上的實驗顯示，PRISM在相對於每個相同協議基準的上下文預算小一個數量級的情況下，提供了顯著更高的LLM評估準確性，佔據了準確性-上下文-成本邊界的先前空白區域，並展示了答案質量與檢索效率之間的優越平衡。
2605.12260.author: Jingyi Peng et.al.
2605.12260.authors: Jingyi Peng, Zhongwei Wan, Weiting Liu, Qiuzhuang Sun
